purpose: The wire contract shared by the datacenter backend (vivijure-backend) and the local-gpu doors (vivijure-local-12gb / vivijure-local-16gb). All three are hand-kept copies with no shared source, so each repo's conformance test asserts against THIS golden; that ties the doors together and catches silent drift (see vivijure-backend #129). Keep this file BYTE-IDENTICAL across all three repos.

fields.prompt: string, REQUIRED (the motion description; an empty prompt is rejected)
fields.keyframe_key: string or null, OPTIONAL (when absent the backend applies its own keyframe convention below)
fields.config: object, engine knobs (tier-clamped; a caller may narrow, never widen)

slug_rule: strip surrounding whitespace; collapse any internal whitespace run to a single '_'; replace '/' with '_'; an empty result becomes 'untitled'
